findings: Financial statements submitted within statutory deadline. External audit completed by Deloitte Zambia.
recommendations: Improve internal controls over revenue recognition from prepaid customers.

findings: ZESCO missed 4 of 8 KPIs in FY2024 performance contract, including revenue target and load shedding reduction target.
recommendations: Develop credible turnaround plan; link CEO performance to KPI achievement.

findings: ZRA exceeded revenue collection target by 5.9% in FY2024, collecting ZMW 125 billion against target of ZMW 118 billion.
recommendations: Expand tax base through informal sector registration; strengthen VAT compliance.

findings: BoZ maintained inflation within target band for 8 of 12 months in 2024. Foreign exchange reserves at 3.2 months import cover.
recommendations: Increase foreign exchange reserves to 4 months import cover as per IMF programme target.

findings: 95% of pension benefits paid within 30 days of application. Member registration database updated quarterly.
recommendations: Implement digital member portal to reduce processing time to 15 days.

findings: 3 contracts awarded without competitive bidding. Contract register not publicly available on website.
recommendations: Publish all contracts on ZPPA portal; implement e-procurement for all contracts above ZMW 2 million.
